## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what changed, why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Skill content (`skills/<name>/`)
- [ ] Manifest change (`*.json`)
- [ ] Hook script change (`hooks/`)
- [ ] CI/workflow change (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] `Validate` workflow passes
- [ ] `IP Guard` workflow passes
- [ ] If bumping version: ran `./scripts/bump-version.sh X.Y.Z`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No internal SQL, table names, library names, or internal repo URLs included
